mapper.select: SELECT l.id, l.job_id AS jobId, j.app_code AS appCode, j.job_name AS jobName, l.trigger_time AS triggerTime, l.finish_time AS finishTime, l.trigger_type AS triggerType, l.executor_address AS executorAddress, l.status, l.attempt_no AS attemptNo, l.error_message AS errorMessage, l.trace_id AS traceId FROM job_fire_log l LEFT JOIN job_info j ON l.job_id = j.id WHERE l.id = #{id}
mapper.update: UPDATE job_fire_log SET status = #{log.status}, attempt_no = #{log.attemptNo}, finish_time = #{log.finishTime}, executor_address = #{log.executorAddress}, error_message = #{log.errorMessage}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{log.id}

UPDATE job_fire_log SET status = #{log.status}, attempt_no = #{log.attemptNo}, executor_address = #{log.executorAddress}, error_message = #{log.errorMessage}, finish_time = #{log.finishTime}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{log.id}
